Package de.uka.ilkd.key.taclettranslation

  • Interface Summary 
    Interface Description
    SkeletonGenerator  
    TacletFormula
    Represents the formula of a taclet.
    It provides methods to get the formula and its corresponding taclet.
    The setting of the formula and the taclet is dedicated to the constructor of the implementing class.
    TacletTranslator  
  • Class Summary 
    Class Description
    AbstractSkeletonGenerator
    Translates a taclet into a logical skeleton without instantiating the schema variables.
    DefaultTacletTranslator
    Translates a rewrite taclet to a formula.
    TacletVisitor  
  • Enum Summary 
    Enum Description
    DefaultTacletTranslator.TacletSections  
  • Exception Summary 
    Exception Description
    IllegalTacletException
